creator: conall@conall.net
text:
Hello,


I'm the maintainer of multimedia/py-soco in the ports tree.


While attempting to provide a maintainer patch via https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/pull/137 instead of patch files via Bugzilla, I discovered I am not authorized to create pull requests.


Could I have the ability to open pull requests to be reviewed by ports committers please?
